raw_consumer_statement: I reported my card missing/stolen in XXXX of this year. They allowed other charges to placed on the credit card even though already reported. I should have a credit of {$5.00}. However, they are still charging late payments and finance charges on items that should not be on my card. The last payment I made, I noticed after paying a charge of {$5.00} after paying the bill. I immediately contacted Citi 's Fraud Department and reported the non-purchase charges. I even called back after contacting the largest of these charges which was a subscription charge I did not ask for. They immediately canceled these charges and gave me a cancellation number. I called back and spoke with a XXXX and he stated that he notated the account of these two credits. XXXX also stated don't worry about the late fees and charges that they will be removed from my account. I contacted Citi today XX/XX/2023 at the Citi Fraud phone number and it states closed even though its the middle of their operating hours. I called customer service and they advised me to pay the bill and I would be credited for the {$100.00} plus charges. I don't really trust that they will do this even if I paid what I don't owe. At this point, I should have a {$5.00} credit and their trying to charge me {$110.00} for charges that I didn't make. Please help.
